title: Proof by Contradiction
description: Prove statement by assuming its negation leads to contradiction
mermaid: graph TD A1[Initial Statement P to Prove] --> B1["Assume ~P (Negation of P) is True"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff B1 --> C1["Establish Initial Assumptions based on ~P"] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 --> D1[Apply Logical Deductions and Known Theorems] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 --> E1["Derive Intermediate Statements"] style E1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff E1 --> F1{Does the derivation lead to a contradiction? (Q & ~Q)} style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1 -- Yes --> G1["Identify the Contradiction (Q & ~Q)"] style G1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff G1 --> H1["Conclude that ~P is False"] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1["Since ~P is False, P must be True"] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff I1 --> J1[Therefore, Statement P is Proven] style J1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff F1 -- No --> K1["Are there other deductions possible?"] style K1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 K1 -- Yes --> D1 K1 -- No --> L1[Re-examine assumptions and derivations for errors] style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> M1{Are errors found?} style M1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 M1 -- Yes --> C1 M1 -- No --> N1[Contradiction not found; consider alternative proof methods or the original statement might be false] style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
entities: /"Assume ~P (Negation of P) is True"/)style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff B1 --> C1["Establish Initial Assumptions based on ~P"
Apply Logical Deductions and Known Theorems
/"Does the derivation lead to a contradiction? (Q & ~Q)"/}style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1 -- Yes --> G1["Identify the Contradiction (Q & ~Q)"
"Since ~P is False, P must be True"
Re-examine assumptions and derivations for errors
/"Are errors found?"/}style M1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 M1 -- Yes --> C1 M1 -- No --> N1[Contradiction not found; consider alternative proof methods or the original statement might be false
